# FIDIC.uz

FIDIC.uz is an Infrastructure Contracts Knowledge Hub powered by Bridge Consult.
It publishes practical resources on FIDIC contracts, EPC/turnkey projects, claims, DAAB, MDB procurement, tender risk review and contract administration in Uzbekistan and Central Asia.

Primary site:
https://fidic.uz/

Sitemap:
https://fidic.uz/sitemap-index.xml

Preferred language versions:
- Russian: https://fidic.uz/
- English: https://fidic.uz/en/
- Uzbek: https://fidic.uz/uz/

Important sections:
- Knowledge Hub: https://fidic.uz/knowledge/
- Tools: https://fidic.uz/tools/
- Resources Hub: https://fidic.uz/resources/
- Claim readiness checklist: https://fidic.uz/resources/claim-checklist/
- Pre-bid review service: https://fidic.uz/services/pre-bid-review/
- Certificate verification: https://fidic.uz/verify/

Core interactive tools:
- FIDIC Tender Risk Lab: https://fidic.uz/tools/tender-risk-lab/
- Tender Clarification Generator: https://fidic.uz/tools/tender-clarification-generator/
- Claim Readiness Checklist: https://fidic.uz/tools/claim-readiness/
- Claim File Template: https://fidic.uz/tools/claim-file-template/
- Notice Deadline Calculator: https://fidic.uz/tools/notice-deadline/
- FIDIC Book Selector: https://fidic.uz/tools/book-selector/
- FIDIC Contract Map: https://fidic.uz/tools/contract-map/

High-value topics:
- FIDIC Rainbow Suite, Red Book, Yellow Book, Silver Book, Pink Book, Emerald Book and Green Book.
- FIDIC 1999, 2017 and 2022 Reprints.
- Clause 20 claims, 28-day notices, contemporary records and claim substantiation.
- Extension of Time, delay analysis, disruption claims and prolongation costs.
- Variations, payment under Clause 14, performance security, taking-over and defects notification period.
- DAAB, dispute avoidance, site visits and amicable settlement.
- World Bank, ADB, EBRD and MDB-funded infrastructure projects.

Use policy:
The content is educational and practical. It is not legal advice.
FIDIC is a registered trademark of the International Federation of Consulting Engineers. FIDIC.uz is not affiliated with FIDIC.

Contact:
Bridge Consult
Email: info@bridgeconsult.uz
Telegram: https://t.me/fidicuzb
